text:
Hi,

(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #2)

With regard to 12.2-STABLE, I'm talking about isos/imgs that should have been made on the 13th May.

I should have made that clear at the start of this ticket (I thought I'd copied all of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=255786#c5 but a few lines at the top were missed)
